description:
2025 BMW X2 sDrive18i, 1.5 TC I3, FWD, 156bhp, 7 Speed Auto. AED 175,000 or AED 2,741 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 21,003 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until March 2030 or 200,000 KM's - BMW Service Contract Valid Until March 2030 or 100,000 KM's - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Wireless Apple Carplay - Panoramic Glass Roof - Ambient Lighting - Reversing Camera - Front & Rear Parking Sensors - Bluetooth Connectivity - Satellite Navigation - Cruise Control - Window Surround In Gloss Black - LED Headlights - Dual-Zone Climate Control - Stop Start Engine - Auto Hold - BMW Driving Modes
